input.code:
# Load DESeq2 and required packages
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)

# Read counts and metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

cat("Counts matrix shape:", nrow(counts), "genes ×", ncol(counts), "cells\n")
cat("Metadata:\n")
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Ensure cell_type is a factor with monocyte as reference
metadata$cell_type <- factor(metadata$cell_type, levels = c('Monocyte', 'T_cell'))

# Construct DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = as.matrix(counts),
  colData = metadata,
  design = ~ cell_type
)

cat("\nDESeqDataSet created:\n")
print(dds)
